title: kagiso.me — Living Homelab Site
description: Public-facing site for the homelab — status dashboard, ops digest, ADR log, project tracker, and live data pipeline.

title: Beesly
description: Self-healing homelab ops, rebuilt as a deterministic engine. Known failures — crashloop, OOM, stuck upgrade, Flux drift — are fixed by tested runbooks (detect → guard → fix → verify) with circuit-breakers that make restart-storms impossible. A watcher that lives outside the cluster catches outages the cluster can't report on itself. Claude is the fallback for novel cases only. Push-only via ntfy.

title: PiKVM
description: Out-of-band KVM-over-IP for every node. Browser-based recovery regardless of OS state — full BIOS access, virtual media, remote OS reinstall. Built with a Pi Zero 2W and a USB HDMI capture card.

title: Forge
description: Personal MTB training command board for a 6-month periodised plan to the Bosveld Classic. A plan engine resolves the right session for 'today', logs completions and weigh-ins, and tracks FTP, W/kg, weight vs phase target, and weekly load. Dark athletic editorial UI, hand-rolled SVG charts — self-hosted and Authentik-gated.

title: FinForge
description: Personal finance command board — the Forge pattern applied to money. Imports FNB bank statements into a transaction ledger, auto-categorises with a rules engine, and tracks budgets, cashflow, and net worth over time. Dark editorial UI, hand-rolled SVG charts, self-hosted and Authentik-gated. AI-assisted categorisation and natural-language queries land in phase 2.
